item.name: Microsoft Azure Get All App Service Plans For A Subscription

query.description: Specify true to return all App Service plan properties. The default is false, which returns a subset of the properties. Retrieval of all properties may increase the API latency.

variable.description: (Required) Your Azure subscription ID. This is a GUID-formatted string (e.g. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000).

request.description: Description for Get all App Service plans for a subscription.

response.name: OK

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get All Apps Associated With An App Service Plan

query.description: Skip to a web app in the list of webapps associated with app service plan. If specified, the resulting list will contain web apps starting from (including) the skipToken. Otherwise, the resulting list contains web apps from the start of the list
Supported filter: $filter=state eq running. Returns only web apps that are currently running
List page size. If specified, results are paged.
